title: Correct the preset selector and restore the visible preset name field
summary: 0.4.6 fixes the two layout problems left behind by 0.4.5. The top-left preset control now follows the real VaM pattern by using a `Select Existing...` browse button instead of a second popup, and the preset name row now uses a stronger visible input-layout seam so the name field actually appears in the live plugin panel.
reasoning: The 0.4.5 reference work found the right VaM preset-manager pattern, but the first pass still surfaced two operator-facing misses in the live panel: the main selector looked like a duplicate popup, and the preset name field did not render visibly. This slice keeps the VaM-style direction but corrects those specific misses without reopening the rest of the player UI.

changes.summary: Replaced the left-side preset popup with a proper `Select Existing...` browse button backed by a JSON file browser rooted at the player preset folder.
changes.reasoning: This matches the actual VaM preset-manager pattern and removes the confusing duplicated-selector look.

changes.summary: Reworked the preset name seam to clone a stronger layout root from the VaM preset-manager input template and force a visible row height for the input surface.
changes.reasoning: The first input clone path compiled but did not produce a visible field in the real plugin panel. This version forces the field into the layout instead of relying on the more fragile previous clone path.

changes.summary: Synced the browse-button path back into the internal selected preset state so load-on-select, favorites, save-or-overwrite logic, and status text continue to operate on the chosen preset.
changes.reasoning: The visible selector changed shape, but the player preset behavior still needs one consistent selected-preset source of truth.

verification: Compile the CUA player in Release with the corrected preset selector and visible preset name field seam.
Compile the no-input seam with `EnablePlayerInputFeatures=false` to `bin\\ReleaseNoInput\\fa_cua_player.dll`.
Build and deploy the versioned `fa_cua_player.0.4.6.dll` and `fa_player_asset.0.4.6.assetbundle` through the existing player foundation script.
Run foundation release validation for 0.4.6 and keep the generated receipt beside the release shelf.
knownIssues: This slice corrects the selector shape and preset-name visibility, but it does not yet add delete, rename, or defaults-management workflows.
The player preset UI still lives inside the standard plugin two-column layout rather than a full custom preset-manager panel.
